title: Smoky Tofu Skewers
description: A simple and flavorful Chinese-inspired dish, featuring smoky tofu and vegetables, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Croatian Skewers
ingredients.notes: soaked in water for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: Bell Peppers
ingredients.notes: any color, cut into large chunks

ingredients.name: Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: button or cremini, cut into large chunks

instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, honey, and sesame oil.
3. Thread the tofu, bell peppers, onion, and mushrooms onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
4. Brush the skewers with the soy sauce mixture and let them sit for at least 10 minutes.
5. Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until they are lightly charred and the vegetables are tender.
6. Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped green onions and a drizzle of soy sauce mixture.
